mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `product`(title, description, image, price, user_id, status, create_time) VALUES( #{title}, #{description}, #{image}, IFNULL(#{price}, 0), #{userId}, IFNULL(#{status}, 1), IFNULL(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, image, price, user_id, status, create_time FROM `product`

SELECT id, title, description, image, price, user_id, status, create_time FROM `product` WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 1
